allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require(''fs''); const { load } = require(''@hyrious/marshal''); const buffer = fs.readFileSync(''D:\\Games\\AmongUs\\LonaRPG_B010310\\LonaRPG\\UserData\\Save01.rvdata2''); const uint8 = new Uint8Array(buffer); let offset = 0; for (let i = 0; i < uint8.length - 1; i++) { if (uint8[i] === 0x04 && uint8[i + 1] === 0x08) { if (offset === 0) offset = i; else { console.log(''Second Marshal section at:'', i); const data = load(uint8.slice(i)); if (data && typeof data === ''object'') { const symbols = Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(data); const actors = symbols.find(s => s.description === ''@actors''); if (actors && data[actors]) { const actorSymbols = Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(data[actors]); const actorData = actorSymbols.find(s => s.description === ''@data''); if (actorData && data[actors][actorData] && data[actors][actorData][1]) { const firstActor = data[actors][actorData][1]; const actorProps = Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(firstActor); console.log(''First actor properties:''); actorProps.forEach(p => console.log(''  -'', p.description)); } } } break; } } }")
